policy.description: Blocking line-coverage ratchets. Update measured counts in the same reviewed change whenever scope or coverage advances; never lower a floor without an explicit, justified scope change.

tolerance.rationale: A clean GitHub Actions Node 22/V8 run on 2026-07-16 measured 1436 covered lines across the 1759-line core scope after adding the shared document-relative Jellyfin SPA route builders. Focused V8 evidence exercised every new executable line, including encoded parameters, invalid routes, and the parameter-free path. One line permits only negligible instrumentation variance.

Three clean reviewed local .NET 10.0.9/Coverlet integration runs on 2026-07-16 each passed 1524 tests and measured the identical 25874-line assembly scope at 17259, 17259, and 17260 covered lines; the reviewed high-water is 17260. The completed #156 scope derives every normalized Seerr integration snapshot, full-configuration digest, URL set, API key, and feature option from one private owned serialized clone, exposes only detached option copies, and assigns an opaque revision-bound generation identity. The exact captured snapshot flows through playback trigger, monitor deduplication, and the real movie/season service boundary; stale A is rejected before user lookup, cache work, or I/O instead of recapturing B. The generation identity also scopes automatic-import failure throttles, movie and season success/ambiguity reservations, monitor-level in-flight/committed/retry deduplication, and manual-import throttling, so late old-generation completions cannot publish into, suppress, or release replacement-generation work. Deterministic regressions cover same-source API-key replacement with a deferred old import; identical-source movie and season reservations; concurrent old/new playback reservations and retry state; a save inside the real monitor-to-service boundary where A emits no traffic and B independently POSTs; old manual-throttle release after B claims ownership; failed-save stability; identical successful replacement advancement; in-place URL/API-key/mapping/cache/feature changes; provider replacement during capture; detached-copy mutation; and immutable URL/key/option projection after same-object provider mutation. The existing two-line tolerance is unchanged and covers only the reproduced one-line Coverlet instrumentation variance between otherwise identical clean runs (about 0.0039 percentage points).
